title.en: China-to-South Africa Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against South Africa NRCS Letter of Authority expectations, SANS / IEC 62109 safety evidence, NRS 097 grid-connection requirements, 50 Hz settings, and EMC evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与南非 NRCS 授权函要求、SANS / IEC 62109 安全证据、NRS 097 并网要求、50 Hz 参数及 EMC 证据差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與南非 NRCS 授權函要求、SANS / IEC 62109 安全證據、NRS 097 併網要求、50 Hz 參數及 EMC 證據差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRCS scope determination, Letter of Authority decision, SANS conformity assessment, NRS 097 grid-connection approval, Eskom or municipal approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current South Africa NRCS, SABS / SANS, NRS 097, Eskom, municipal, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRCS 适用范围裁定、授权函决定、SANS 合格评定、NRS 097 并网批准、Eskom 或市政批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行南非 NRCS、SABS / SANS、NRS 097、Eskom、市政、海关及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRCS 適用範圍裁定、授權函決定、SANS 合格評定、NRS 097 併網批准、Eskom 或市政批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行南非 NRCS、SABS / SANS、NRS 097、Eskom、市政、海關及專案要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to South Africa, the main gaps are determining whether the model needs an NRCS Letter of Authority under the applicable compulsory specification route, preparing SANS / IEC 62109 safety evidence, proving NRS 097-2-1 utility-interface behavior for Eskom or municipal connection, configuring South Africa 50 Hz settings, and documenting EMC evidence under SANS adoptions of CISPR / IEC standards.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口南非时，主要差距包括：判定型号是否需要依据适用强制规范路径取得 NRCS 授权函，准备 SANS / IEC 62109 安全证据，证明符合 Eskom 或市政并网所需的 NRS 097-2-1 公用电网接口行为，配置南非 50 Hz 参数，并按 SANS 采标的 CISPR / IEC 标准整理 EMC 证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口南非時，主要差距包括：判定型號是否需要依據適用強制規範路徑取得 NRCS 授權函，準備 SANS / IEC 62109 安全證據，證明符合 Eskom 或市政併網所需的 NRS 097-2-1 公用電網接口行為，配置南非 50 Hz 參數，並按 SANS 採標的 CISPR / IEC 標準整理 EMC 證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
